title: Sprint 2 make the living world matter
summary: Sprint 2 should convert the living-world seam into stronger replay value, stronger home-place return payoff, and stronger relationship-teaching ecology without growing the shell.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the lane-1 home-place payoff and coordinator split handoff.
execution_order.why_now: The home loop should feel more earned before the project opens a larger next chapter.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the lane-2 relationship-teaching coast pass.
execution_order.why_now: The coast branch is still the best place to teach ecology through relationship rather than accumulation.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the lane-3 high-country relief continuation.
execution_order.why_now: The second act still wants one more unforgettable place.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the lane-4 living-world replay variant pass.
execution_order.why_now: Replay should change action rather than just route wording.

guardrails: Replay should change what the player does, not just what text they read.
Home-place payoff should grow through the existing station shell.
Keep ecology teaching relationship-first rather than fact-count-first.

main_303_focus.payoff_seam: reuse the existing field-station arrivalPulse on the current sill-and-gutter accent family so earned returns feel warmer without adding copy
main_303_focus.split_target: move field-station session-open normalization and arrival-mode derivation out of game.ts
recommended_hotspots: overlay-render.ts field-station growth/backdrop accent draw helpers
avoid: new station rows or recap copy

main_304_focus.target_seam: one late-beach wrack-line relationship pass through the existing ecosystem-note and notebook-prompt surfaces
avoid: new notebook layout or shell work

main_305_focus.target_band: just beyond lee-pocket-lee-rest but before the tundra corridor door comes into range
recommended_shape: one tiny fell-island step only if the current release still feels empty
one compact fell-island rest as the real open-fell benchmark stop
avoid: adding more height to the lee-pocket family
moving corridor door or travel logic
adding a new traversal family or UI surface

main_306_focus.target_seam: let Route v2 replay focuses add alternate clue carriers so existing replay labels become action-changing instead of text-only
avoid: new replay HUD or planner copy
invented Creek Bend alternates for forest-cool-edge
changing filed note text away from clue-backed names
